classes.reasoning: The document is explicitly titled 'eCRF MODULE: END OF TREATMENT (EOT)' and contains structured data capture fields for patient code, site ID, treatment discontinuation reasons, dose information, and assessments. It includes an investigator signature block typical of case report forms.

summary: This is a Case Report Form (CRF) module designed to capture End of Treatment (EOT) data for patients in the BIORCE-ONC-2023-001 study. It collects information on discontinuation reasons, treatment duration, dose received, best overall response per RECIST v1.1, EOT assessments, and post-study treatment plans.
